title: The Three Wise Men Of Gotham
content:
The Three Wise Men Of Gotham.

                    Three wise men of Gotham
                        Went to sea in a bowl:



                    If the bowl had been stronger,
                        My song would have been longer.
meaning:
Leonard Leslie Brooke's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Three Wise Men Of Gotham"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
